subcategory: WebGL shader smoke animation with FBM noise
use_cases: Hero section background with atmospheric smoke effects
Landing page ambient animation with customizable brand colors
Creative portfolio background with dynamic fog effects
Product showcase overlay with ethereal smoke atmosphere
Interactive storytelling background with fluid smoke simulation
ai_summary: A WebGL fragment shader-based smoke animation component that renders real-time atmospheric fog effects using Fractional Brownian Motion noise. The component accepts a customizable color uniform to tint the smoke, creating ethereal, flowing smoke clouds that animate continuously. Ideal as a background or overlay for hero sections, landing pages, and creative portfolios seeking dynamic ambient visual effects.
